title: Tasty Crumbly Jamaican White Cabbage Hash
description: A sweet and crumbly Jamaican dish featuring white cabbage, this hash is a quick-fix flexitarian-friendly meal option. It is broiled to perfection and can be served at any time of day.
instructions: Preheat the broiler to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the shredded cabbage, chopped onion, scotch bonnet pepper, garlic, allspice, thyme, salt, and black pepper.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the cabbage mixture to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated broiler and broil for 5 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned.
Remove the skillet from the oven and stir the cabbage mixture.
Return the skillet to the broiler and broil for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the top is crispy and golden brown.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
